use_cases: User login and authentication flows for web applications
Secure credential collection with password visibility toggle
Interactive 3D card effect for enhanced visual engagement during sign-in
Remember me functionality for persistent user sessions
ai_summary: A polished sign-in card component featuring email and password input fields with a 3D tilt effect that responds to mouse movement. Includes password visibility toggle, remember me checkbox, and loading state. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and a glassmorphism-inspired dark aesthetic suitable for modern SaaS and e-commerce authentication forms.
